channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Pénurie de puces : cette décision chinoise risque encore de faire exploser les prix
item.description: Pékin coupe ses exportations d'hélium, gaz discret mais vital pour les usines de puces. Après le néon en 2022, la tech redécouvre sa fragilité. Et votre prochaine barrette de RAM pourrait en faire les frais.

item.title: Beatbot AquaSense X Review: A Pool Robot That Cleans Itself
item.description: The AquaSense X brings self-cleaning technology to pool robots for the first time, but is it worth nearly twice the price of Beatbot’s flagship cleaner?

item.title: Skylight’s Touchscreen Calendar Got my Whole Family on the Same Page
item.description: The Skylight has become the informational and organizational hub of my household. My touchscreen-native kids have also gained more agency over our family activities.

item.title: I’ve driven the hybrid Audi RS 5 — and it's completely changed what I think of plug-in hybrids
item.description: Audi's latest RS 5 blends 639hp with some of the smartest hybrid tech I've tested.

item.title: Samsung Micro RGB R95H Review (2026): Not the Brightest
item.description: There’s a new fleet of TVs using new mini and micro RBG display tech, and Samsung’s R95H model isn’t as impressive as it should be.

item.title: AI Found a Root Bug in Linux That Everyone Missed for 15 Years
item.description: Plus: The Pentagon is training amateurs to become part of its hacker army, a Flock license plate reader error led to cops surrounding a car reviewer, and more.

item.title: How to watch Fiji vs England for FREE: Live streams and TV channels for Nations Championship 2026 match
item.description: All the ways to watch Fiji vs England live streams – including for FREE – for the Round 2 Nations Championship 2026 game at Hill Dickinson Stadium.

item.title: Ukrainians are using VPNs to cause havoc in Russia by changing fuel station statuses on maps in a bid to cause chaos and confusion
item.description: A Ukraine-linked online campaign reportedly alters Russian fuel station map data, creating confusion among drivers through coordinated digital participation.

item.title: Norvège-Angleterre : comment voir le quart de finale de la Coupe du monde 2026 en streaming ?
item.description: Le quart de finale Norvège-Angleterre s'annonce comme l'une des affiches les plus attendues de ce Mondial 2026. Ce samedi 11 juillet, à 23h00, voici tout ce qu'il faut savoir pour ne rater aucune seconde du match, que ce soit en clair sur M6 ou via beIN Sports.

item.title: Climatiseur miracle, NASA, complot : une nouvelle arnaque fait rage sur les réseaux sociaux
item.description: Sur les réseaux sociaux, une arnaque prétend que deux anciens ingénieurs de la NASA ont conçu un climatiseur révolutionnaire de la taille d’un grille-pain. Selon cette publicité frauduleuse, l’appareil serait capable de faire chuter la température d’une pièce de 15 degrés en seulement 90 secondes. Ce type d’arnaque se multiplie depuis le début de l’été. Mais comment la repérer ?...

item.title: We Make Lovely Home-Cooked Meals for Ourselves. Why Not Do the Same for Our Dogs?
item.description: More dog owners have begun cooking for their canine companions in recent years. When my own dog fell ill, I became part of this growing group.

item.title: I review smart rings for a living, and the Samsung Galaxy Ring 2 needs these 6 upgrades to stay relevant
item.description: We rated the original Galaxy Ring highly, but the next version will enter an even more competitive market.

item.title: 6 frugal ways to beat the brutal heat
item.description: As temperatures routinely hit triple digits, here are half a dozen cheap ways to keep cool, even without air-conditioning. The house I currently live in was built on the outskirts of Milwaukee in 1941–which means it does not have central air-conditioning. In the ten years we’ve lived here, the lack of A/C has only bothered us for about two weeks every August. We can power through those hot, sticky days with window air conditioners in each of the three bedrooms, and before we know it, we’re back to complaining about the snow....

item.title: How Maison de Sabré built a cult business of bag charms from scraps
item.description: The Sabré brothers turned their cutting-room floor scraps into covetable bag charms. They believe the whimsy—and sustainability—they’re offering is key to being a next-generation luxury brand. Maison de Sabré has spent nearly a decade building a reputation for colorful, beautifully crafted leather handbags. But lately, the thing that makes people fall for the brand isn’t a bag at all—it’s the charms....

item.title: Housing market shift explained—and where it’s happening the quickest
item.description: The pandemic housing boom was too much, too fast. After a stretch of unprecedented national growth, the industry has been grinding through a period of recalibration. Want more housing market stories from Lance Lambert’s ResiClub in your inbox? Subscribe to the ResiClub newsletter.

item.title: Non, Xbox n’a « sauvé » aucun studio de jeu vidéo cette semaine
item.description: Derrière l'apparence de quatre studios sauvés de la fermeture, se cache une dure réalité pour les milliers de salariés licenciés.

item.title: Best Hiking Boots (2026): Walking Shoes, Trails, Backpacking
item.description: From strenuous hikes and serious summits to weekend rambles in the park, these boots help you make the most of your time outdoors.

item.title: China’s Tianwen-2 Space Probe Has Rendezvoused With Earth’s Quasi-Moon
item.description: The probe sent back the first pictures of the asteroid Kamo’oalewa. Next step: landing on the surface and collecting samples to send back to Earth.

item.title: Ultramarine P1 : le tout premier robot piscine d’Ecovacs plonge sous les 400 € pendant les soldes
item.description: Ecovacs s'est attaqué au marché des robots dédiés à l'entretien des piscines. Dévoilé en début d'année, son premier robot piscine Ultramarine P1 est proposé à 399 euros au lieu de 549 euros sur Amazon pendant les soldes d'été.

item.title: Smartphone, enceinte, écouteurs et support : ce pack Google Pixel 10 chez Darty coche toutes les cases
item.description: Le Google Pixel 10, dernier smartphone de Google avec sa puce Tensor G5 et son triple capteur photo, est proposé en pack chez Darty avec une enceinte JBL Flip 7, des écouteurs Pixel Buds A-Series et un support Pixelsnap. Le tout passe à 549 euros au lieu de 649 euros grâce à une offre de remboursement de 100 euros. Il y a aussi un autre pack sur Boulanger. ...
